sections.title: Fats

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: high satiety protein source because that is a major real-world strength for meat. complete protein delivery is reliable because the category is supposed to do this well. easy to centre a meal around because practical meal value matters.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: fat quality can go sideways fast because some meats are strong until the fat profile shows up. cost and storage can be a pain because practical downsides still count. quality swings a lot by cut and processing because the category can look very different depending on what version you actually buy.

closing.summary: Anchovies has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want efficient protein and can accept the category tradeoffs that come with it.
